tracks.rawText: 2:27Studio Selectionv5.5CoverSpanish trap and reggaeton fusion at 100 BPM in the key of G minor, The track features a dark, minimalist production style centered around a heavy 808 bassline that provides melodic movement, A repetitive, high-pitched bell-like synth melody creates a tense atmosphere, The percussion consists of a standard reggaeton dembow rhythm with crisp snares, sharp hi-hat rolls, and a punchy kick drum, Male vocals are delivered in a rhythmic, aggressive rap style with occasional melodic inflections and heavy use of autotune, The arrangement includes sudden beat cuts and filtered transitions to emphasize lyrical delivery, A subtle, atmospheric pad provides harmonic depth in the background during the melodic bridges4PublishRemix
